message:
chore(beads,abi): re-enable self-join deadlock test and close threading lifecycle beads

Remove #[ignore] attribute from pthread_self_join_is_rejected_with_edeadlk
test now that dual-layer self-join deadlock prevention (core+ABI guards) has
been hardened and validated as stable across scheduler orderings.

Close three beads with validation evidence:
- bd-xxd9.1: self-join deadlock hardened, regression test re-enabled
- bd-xxd9: threading/futex lifecycle test pack complete (mutex/condvar/
  rwlock/once/tsd + lifecycle regressions validated)
- bd-25n: unit test expansion program complete, all blocker subtasks closed

Promote bd-2vv (glibc symbol coverage epic, 250→3160 symbols) to in_progress
and assign bd-2vv.1 (string/wcs family symbol completion) as first subtask.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
